titlestmt.author: Compiled by A. Mcfadden, Mary Warren

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-02-28 23:49:50 -0500.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Letters, manuscripts, notes, books, photographs, and drawings
did.abstract: Correspondence, notes, manuscripts, and memoranda pertaining to the administration of the Laboratory of Ornithology and her other interests in ornithology; rough drafts of Arthur A. Allen correspondence and writings; Edna Lane's Bird and Flying Squirrel field notes; Christmas newsletters with photographs from Peter Paul Kellogg; and J. Southgate Hoyt field notes, manuscripts, drawings, a draft of his Ph.D. thesis, and photographs, primarily relating to the pileated woodpecker. Also, Arthur Allen slides that match Bird Song records and files relating to the Federation of New York State Bird Clubs.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Ornithologist, Administrative Assistant at the Cornell University Laboratory of Ornithology.

defitem.label: Series I. Laboratory of Ornithology and Personal Correspondence
Series II. Arthur A. Allen Drafts
Series III. Southgate Y. Hoyt and Sally Hoyt Spofford Papers

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Sally Hoyt Spofford Papers, #21-18-2374. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, notes, manuscripts, and memoranda pertaining to the administration of the Laboratory of Ornithology and her other interests in ornithology; rough drafts of Arthur A. Allen correspondence and writings; Edna Lane's Bird and Flying Squirrel field notes; Christmas newsletters with photographs from Peter Paul Kellogg; and J. Southgate Hoyt field notes, manuscripts, drawings, a draft of his Ph.D. thesis, and photographs, primarily relating to the pileated woodpecker. Also, Arthur Allen slides that match Bird Song records and files relating to the Federation of New York State Bird Clubs.

did.unittitle: Series I. Laboratory of Ornithology and Personal Correspondence

did.unittitle: Arthur A. Allen; Peter Paul Kellogg

did.unittitle: Response to J. Southgate Y. Hoyt Broadcast,
Series II. Arthur A. Allen Drafts
Series III. J. Southgate Y. Hoyt and Sally Hoyt Spofford Papers
New York Upstate Birds - Hoyt and Pettingill - Early Drafts,
Key to North America Bird Eggs - Manuscript,
Laboratory of Ornithology Correspondence, S. H. Spofford,
Nature Study Course, Cold Spring Harbor - Long Island Biological Association,
"Edna Lane's Bird and Flying Squirrel Notes",
Ornithology Synopsis and Key to Birds
The Migration of Birds, S. Y. Hoyt,
Drawings - Pileated Woodpecker Anatomy, J. Southgate Hoyt
Notes on 1941 Pileated Woodpecker Nest, Phloeo,
Student Photographs in South's Course, Hoyt
Birds of the World by A. A. Allen; Lecture and Laboratory Notes, Ornithology 126,
"Example of Recent American Bird Art" by Harry Harris,
"Bird Life in America" Series II (2 complete sets)
Laboratory of Ornithology History by Spofford
Laboratory of Ornithology Newsletters and Meeting Minutes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a note to Charles Smith from "Sally and Spoff" from 1991

did.unittitle: Federation of New York State Bird Clubs (1)
Federation of New York State Bird Clubs (2)
Arthur Allen's discarded conservation lecture notes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes an hand-drawn map of Sapsucker Woods with notations of bird sighting from 1935-1941

did.unittitle: The 1957-1958 New Zealand-Australia Expedition of the Laboratory of Ornithology
Arthur Allen Slides that Match Bird Song Records
Arthur Allen slides that match Bird Song Records; other Arthur Allen slides
Negatives of Pileated Woodpecker work by J.S. Hoyt; other bird species; copies of famous prints
Pileated film from Man in Ohio
